name: harness-designing
description: Design-focused AI harness. 4 skills for learning, setting up, maintaining, and reviewing a five-layer design harness (Context, Skills, Orchestration, Rubrics, Knowledge).

interface.shortDescription: Set up, review, and maintain a five-layer design AI harness.
interface.longDescription: Harness Designing turns scattered design-team AI practices into a reusable five-layer harness: Context, Skills, Orchestration, Rubrics, and Knowledge. It bundles four skills for learning the framework, setting up a repo, capturing lessons, and reviewing harness health, plus starter rubrics and a Context7 MCP connector for documentation lookup.
defaultPrompt: Use Design Harness to explain the five-layer design harness framework.
Use Design Harness to set up a design AI harness in this repo.
Use Design Harness to review this repo's current design harness health.
